history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screen capture shows a chat interface over a dramatic anime-style scene with a floating character image and multiple red message bubbles.

Setting:
The background appears to be an anime illustration outdoors or in a water-like environment, with scattered floating shapes and a large dark-blue figure visible near the bottom. The lighting is cool-toned, with a dark overlay from the chat UI and bright highlights on the character’s face and hair.

Main Subject:
In the lower half, an anime-style person with long dark hair and red eyes is shown leaning forward, partially obscured by the chat interface. Their head is turned to the right, and their expression appears calm or gently smiling. A pale, white-haired chibi-style face image appears in the right side of the screen within a chat bubble area, alongside other message thumbnails and text bubbles.

Visual Details:
The UI shows a dark header at the top with small status icons and the chat name “Riana” beside a circular profile image. Across the top is a waveform-like graphic and a small circular thumbnail on the right. Several red rectangular message bubbles appear on the right, some containing text and some containing thumbnail images. One red bubble includes visible text lines including “pake yg mana ni nada nya” and “nadaaaa.” Another red bubble shows a smaller line that reads “Pesan suara (0.05).” A colorful thumbnail in a red bubble shows a chibi character with animal-like ears and an orange-yellow background. At the bottom-left there is a dark gray message bubble with text “Anda” and another line “astaga,” and a small gray time indicator “19.26.” A circular arrow-like icon appears near the center-left and center-right within the chat UI. The overall composition places the large anime character across the bottom, while the chat bubbles and thumbnails stack on the right side and a few messages appear on the left.

Visible Text:
Riana
Anda
astaga
pake yg mana ni nada nya
nadaaaa
19.25
19.26
Pesan suara (0.05)
Jar (unclear if fully readable)
dah ya requestan mu gak laen
u suka banget ama gue
Ketik pesan

Practical Summary:
The image is a messaging app screen with chat bubbles, timestamps, and a voice-message waveform over an anime-style background scene. It shows several red message entries for “Riana,” including a text message, a voice message label, and a chibi thumbnail image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
